title: Nanoxplore synthesis does not works when using abc9 flow

features.name: module with abc9_lut attribute lacking specify block
features.description: Code should include a module with (* abc9_lut *) attribute that contains no specify block entries, triggering ABC9 flow error
features.snippet: (* abc9_lut *) module NX_LUT(input a, output y); assign y = a; endmodule
